Home / Services / Basement Finishing

Basement Finishing

Unlock the full potential of your Omaha home with our professional basement finishing services.

Don't let your basement be wasted space. ASAP Remodeling can transform your unfinished basement into a valuable living area, adding square footage and functionality to your home. Whether you're looking for a home theater, a game room, a home office, or an extra bedroom, we can bring your vision to life. We understand the unique challenges of Omaha basements, including moisture control and proper insulation. Our team will ensure your finished basement is comfortable, safe, and free from mold and mildew. We handle all aspects of the project, including framing, drywall, electrical, plumbing, and flooring. We use high-quality materials that are durable and moisture-resistant, ensuring your finished basement will stand the test of time. We also handle all necessary permits and inspections, so you can relax and enjoy the transformation. From design to completion, we'll work with you every step of the way to create a basement that meets your specific needs and enhances your lifestyle.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Initial Consultation & Design: Discuss your needs, budget and design preferences.
  2. 02 Step 2: Moisture Assessment & Remediation: Address any existing moisture issues to ensure a dry and healthy basement.
  3. 03 Step 3: Framing & Insulation: Construct the framework and insulate for energy efficiency and comfort.
  4. 04 Step 4: Electrical & Plumbing: Install necessary wiring and plumbing for your desired layout.
  5. 05 Step 5: Finishing Touches: Drywall, flooring, painting, and final inspections for a beautiful finished space.

Benefits

  • Increased living space
  • Increased home value
  • Improved energy efficiency
  • Customized living area tailored to your needs

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you address moisture issues in basements?

We conduct thorough moisture assessments and implement solutions such as waterproofing membranes, sump pumps, and proper ventilation to prevent moisture problems.

Do I need a permit to finish my basement?

Yes, a permit is required for basement finishing in Omaha. We will handle the permit application process for you.

What type of flooring is best for basements?

We recommend using moisture-resistant flooring options such as engineered wood, tile, or epoxy coatings for basements.
